frame_label: Dress Code: Traditional = Respectable, Other = Questionable
generated_comment:
A: Kal townhall mein jo new joinee thi, saree mein kaafi composed aur decent lag rahi thi.
B: Haan?
A: Frankly, women look more professional in Indian wear only—yeh western outfits mein unnecessary mixed signals chalte hain, phir log comment kar dete hain toh surprise kaisa.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it links a woman's clothing to her decency and professionalism, while subtly suggesting that western clothing invites comments or harassment. It encodes the traditional-dress-as-respectable frame and the harassment-blame link.
persona_text: You are Sanjay. Age 44. A regional director at a large FMCG company in Delhi. You are on a phone call with your counterpart in another region after the company announced that a woman has been appointed as the new national sales head. You are sharing your honest reaction to the appointment and what you think it means for the company's direction.
